headline: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
summary: Elon Musk's stake in SpaceX is worth more than $766 billion. Combined with his Tesla holdings, Musk's net worth as of Friday is roughly $1.05 trillion.

headline: Nasdaq-100 Index® June 2026 Quarterly Changes
summary: NEW YORK, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Nasdaq (Nasdaq: NDAQ) today announced the results of the June 2026 quarterly rebalance of the Nasdaq-100 Index® (NDX®), which will become effective prior to market open on Monday, June 22, 2026. The following five companies will be added to the Index: Astera Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: ALAB), CoreWeave, Inc. (Nasdaq: CRWV), Nebius Group N.V.
